---
title: "disc_selection"
output:
  html_document: default
  word_document: default
  pdf_document: default
date: "2026-01-28"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#Installations for first use:
```{r}
# if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
#     install.packages("BiocManager")
# 
# BiocManager::install("phyloseq")
# 
# if(!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
#     install.packages("BiocManager")
# BiocManager::install("Maaslin2")
# 
# install.packages("Matrix")
# install.packages("pgirmess")
# install.packages("agricolae")
# install.packages("ggpubr")
# install.packages("gt")
# install.packages("FSA")
```


#Load libraries and data:

Required libraries:
```{r}
library(vegan)
library (ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(data.table)
library(cowplot)

library(readr)
library(phyloseq)
library(pgirmess)
library(agricolae)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)
library(FSA)
library(Maaslin2)
# https://huttenhower.sph.harvard.edu/maaslin2/
library(tidyverse)
library(lmerTest)

```




## change cohort here DC / SV1 2

```{r}

filname= "20260326_Overview samples for Animesh_addedclinicalparameters.xlsx"
## change cohort here
#phy.red <- readRDS("phyloseq_discDC_red.rds")
phy.red <- readRDS("phyloseq_val_one.rds")  ## one/ two

alpha <- estimate_richness(
  phy.red,
  measures = c("Shannon", "Simpson", "Observed")
) %>%
  rownames_to_column("Sample_ID")

meta_phy <- data.frame(sample_data(phy.red)) %>%
  mutate(Sample_ID = rownames(.)) %>%   # SAFE
  rename(Patient_ID = Patient.ID)

meta <- read_excel(filname, sheet = "Metadata") %>%
  rename(
    Patient_ID = `Patient-ID`,
    Gestational_age = `Gestational age (days)`,
    Birth_weight = `Birth weight (grams)`,
  #  Center = `Center of birth`,
    AB_ratio = AB_IV_days_beforet0_ratio,
    Feeding_type = `Feeding type at full enteral feeding`,
    Mode_delivery = `Mode of delivery`,
    Week_of_life = Sample_week_of_life,
    Invasive_device = Invasive_medical_device_beforet0,
    Storage_years = Storage_duration_years
  )


meta_clean <- meta %>%
  group_by(Patient_ID) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ first(na.omit(.))), .groups = "drop")

df <- alpha %>%
  left_join(meta_phy, by = "Sample_ID") %>%
  left_join(meta_clean, by = "Patient_ID")

df <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Cohort.x)) %>%
  mutate(
    Patient_ID = as.factor(Patient_ID),
    Cohort = factor(Cohort.x,
                    levels = c("Discovery cohort",
                               "Validation cohort 1",
                               "Validation cohort 2")),
    
    Disease_state = factor(
      Disease_state,
      levels = c(0, 1),
      labels = c("No sepsis", "Sepsis")
      ),
   # Center = as.factor(Center),
    Feeding_type = as.factor(Feeding_type),
    Mode_delivery = as.factor(Mode_delivery),
    Invasive_device = as.factor(Invasive_device)
  )

levels(df$Cohort)

```




```{r}

alpha_measures <- c("Shannon", "Simpson", "Observed")

clinical_vars <- c(
  "Disease_state",
  "Subgroup",
  "Bloodculture_isolated_pathogen.x",
  "Gestational_age",
  "Birth_weight",
  "AB_ratio",
  "Feeding_type",
  "Mode_delivery",
  "Week_of_life",
  "Invasive_device",
  "Storage_years"
)


library(lmerTest)
library(broom.mixed)
library(purrr)

run_models <- function(data, clinical_vars, alpha_var) {
  
  res <- lapply(clinical_vars, function(var) {
    
    df_sub <- data %>%
      filter(!is.na(.data[[var]]),
             !is.na(.data[[alpha_var]])) %>%
      mutate(
        Disease_state = droplevels(Disease_state)
      )
    
    # check variation
    has_disease_variation <- length(unique(df_sub$Disease_state)) == 2
    
    # basic checks
    if(nrow(df_sub) < 5) return(NULL)
    if(is.factor(df_sub[[var]]) && nlevels(df_sub[[var]]) < 2) return(NULL)
    
    # 🔥 enforce proper binary structure when possible
    if(has_disease_variation){
      df_sub$Disease_state <- factor(df_sub$Disease_state,
                                     levels = c("No sepsis", "Sepsis"))
    }
    
    # ✅ MODEL LOGIC
    if(var == "Disease_state"){
      
      if(!has_disease_variation) return(NULL)
      
      formula <- as.formula(
        paste(alpha_var, "~ Disease_state + (1 | Patient_ID)")
      )
      
    } else {
      
      if(has_disease_variation){
        
        formula <- as.formula(
          paste(alpha_var, "~", var, "+ Disease_state + (1 | Patient_ID)")
        )
        
      } else {
        
        # drop Disease_state if no variation
        formula <- as.formula(
          paste(alpha_var, "~", var, "+ (1 | Patient_ID)")
        )
      }
    }
    
    model <- tryCatch(
      lmerTest::lmer(formula, data = df_sub),
      error = function(e) return(NULL)
    )
    
    if(is.null(model)) return(NULL)
    
    broom.mixed::tidy(model, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE) %>%
      mutate(Variable = var, Alpha = alpha_var)
  })
  
  dplyr::bind_rows(res)
}


## change here for cohort DC / SV1 2

results <- df %>%
  group_split(Cohort) %>%
  map_df(function(subdf) {
    
    # cohort_name <- unique(subdf$Cohort)  ##  for DC
    cohort_name <- "Validation cohort 1" #unique(subdf$Cohort)[1]   # ✅ FIX
    #cohort_name <- unique(subdf$Cohort)
    
    map_df(alpha_measures, function(alpha_var) {
      
      res <- run_models(subdf, clinical_vars, alpha_var)
      
      if(nrow(res) == 0) return(NULL)
      
      res$Cohort <- cohort_name
      res
    })
  })

```


```{r}
str(results)
nrow(results)
colnames(results)
```


```{r}


results_clean <- results %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") %>%
 ## filter(!grepl("Disease_state", term)) %>%
  mutate(
    p_adj = p.adjust(p.value, method = "fdr"),
    significance = case_when(
      p_adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_adj < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p_adj < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  )


results_clean <- results_clean %>%
  mutate(
    term_clean = case_when(
      grepl("Bloodculture", term) ~ 
      gsub("Bloodculture_isolated_pathogen", "", term),
      grepl("Disease_state", term) ~ "Disease state",
      grepl("Gestational_age", term) ~ "Gestational age",
      grepl("Birth_weight", term) ~ "Birth weight",
    #  grepl("Center", term) ~ "Center of birth",
      grepl("AB_ratio", term) ~ "Antibiotic exposure",
      grepl("Week_of_life", term) ~ "Week of life",
      grepl("Feeding_type", term) ~ "Feeding type",
      grepl("Mode_delivery", term) ~ "Mode of delivery",
      grepl("Invasive_device", term) ~ "Invasive device",
      grepl("Storage_years", term) ~ "Storage duration",
      TRUE ~ term
    )
  )


```



"Disease_state"
```{r}


results_clean <- results_clean %>%
  mutate(
    term_clean = case_when(
      
      grepl("Bloodculture_isolated_pathogen", term) ~ 
      gsub("Bloodculture_isolated_pathogen\\.x", "", term) %>%
      gsub("Bloodculture_isolated_pathogen\\.y", "", .),
      grepl("Disease_state", term) ~ "Disease state",
      grepl("Gestational_age", term) ~ "Gestational age",
      grepl("Birth_weight", term) ~ "Birth weight",
    #  grepl("Center", term) ~ "Center of birth",
      grepl("AB_ratio", term) ~ "Antibiotic exposure",
      grepl("Week_of_life", term) ~ "Week of life",
      grepl("Feeding_type", term) ~ "Feeding type",
      grepl("Mode_delivery", term) ~ "Mode of delivery",
      grepl("Invasive_device", term) ~ "Invasive device",
      grepl("Storage_years", term) ~ "Storage duration",
      
      TRUE ~ term
    )
  )

library(stringr)

results_clean <- results_clean %>%
  mutate(term_clean = str_replace_all(term_clean, "^\\.", ""))  # remove leading dots

results_clean <- results_clean %>%
  filter(
    !grepl("Bloodculture_isolated_pathogen", term) | 
    grepl("Escherichia coli", term)
  )

results_clean <- results_clean %>%
  filter(!(Variable != "Disease_state" & grepl("Disease_state", term)))

plot_alpha <- function(alpha_name) {
  
  p <- results_clean %>%
    filter(Alpha == alpha_name) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = estimate,
               y = reorder(term_clean, estimate))) +
    
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    
    geom_errorbarh(
      aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high),
      height = 0.2
    ) +
    
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    
    geom_text(
      aes(label = significance),
      hjust = -0.3,
      size = 4
    ) +
    
    facet_wrap(~Cohort, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    
    labs(
      title = paste("Alpha Diversity:", alpha_name),
      x = "Effect size (β ± 95% CI)",
      y = "Clinical parameters"
    ) +
    
    theme_bw(base_size = 12)
  
  return(p)
}

p_shannon  <- plot_alpha("Shannon")
p_simpson  <- plot_alpha("Simpson")
p_observed <- plot_alpha("Observed")

p_shannon
p_simpson
p_observed
#ggsave("alphafigs/fig1-DC-Shannon_effects.png", p_shannon, width = 8, height = 10)
#ggsave("alphafigs/fig1-DC-Simpson_effects.png", p_simpson, width = 8, height = 10)
#ggsave("alphafigs/fig1-DC-Observed_effects.png", p_observed, width = 8, height = 10)

ggsave("alphafigs/fig1-SV1-Shannon_effects.png", p_shannon, width = 8, height = 10)
ggsave("alphafigs/fig1-SV1-Simpson_effects.png", p_simpson, width = 8, height = 10)
ggsave("alphafigs/fig1-SV1-Observed_effects.png", p_observed, width = 8, height = 10)


```


## raw file save

```{r}

library(writexl)
write_xlsx(results,
           "rawfileAB/alpha_SV2-diversity_mixed_models_raw.xlsx")

results_export <- results_clean %>%
  select(
    Cohort,
    Alpha,
    Variable,
    term = term_clean,
    estimate,
    conf.low,
    conf.high,
    p_value = p.value,
    FDR = p_adj,
    significance
  ) %>%
  arrange(Cohort, Alpha, desc(abs(estimate)))

#write_xlsx(results_export, "rawfileAB/alpha_DC-diversity_results_clean.xlsx")

```


```{r}
table(df$Disease_state)
unique(results$term)

```


```{r}
plot_alpha <- function(alpha_name) {
  
  p <- results_clean %>%
    filter(Alpha == alpha_name) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = estimate,
               y = reorder(term_clean, estimate))) +
    
    geom_point(size = 3) +
    
    geom_errorbarh(
      aes(xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high),
      height = 0.2
    ) +
    
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    
    geom_text(
      aes(label = significance),
      hjust = -0.3,
      size = 4
    ) +
    
    facet_wrap(~Cohort, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    
    labs(
      title = paste("Alpha Diversity:", alpha_name),
      x = "Effect size (β ± 95% CI)",
      y = "Clinical parameters"
    ) +
    
    theme_bw(base_size = 12)
  
  return(p)
}

p_shannon  <- plot_alpha("Shannon")
p_simpson  <- plot_alpha("Simpson")
p_observed <- plot_alpha("Observed")

```


```{r}
names(results_clean)
```



```{r}

table(df$Cohort)

```

How to interpret your figure (for paper)
β > 0 → increases microbiome diversity
β < 0 → decreases diversity
CI crossing 0 → not significant
Compare consistency across:
Cohort A (discovery)
Cohort B/C (validation)


```{r}
ggsave("Figure1_AlphaDiversity_ClinicalFactors.png",
       width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)


write.csv(results_clean,
          "Figure1_LMM_results.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```
